subcodes.first_line: The Book of God hath been sent down in truth from the direction of the Throne. Verily, He is the All-Powerful, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise, and He is the Embroiderer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله نزل بالحق عن جهه العرش انه لهو المقتدر العلیم الحکیم و انه لطراز
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
